column2: Test Reviewer's Ability to Judge Nominal and Worst-Credible Behavior with Unclear or Incomplete CONOPS/ODD
column3: ['Prepare a UAS operation with unclear or incomplete CONOPS and ODD. ', 'Assign the CAA safety-case reviewer to evaluate the provided UAS operation. ', 'Observe if the reviewer can accurately judge nominal and worst-credible behavior based on the given information. ']
